reviews.comment:
Muy bueno, todo en su lugar.
La calidad de la NAFTA está garantizada.
El minimarket está muy bien atendido.
Los playeros atienden de manera correcta.

(Translated by Google)
Very good, everything in its place.
The quality of the gasoline is guaranteed.
The convenience store is very well staffed.
The attendants provide excellent service.

reviews.comment:
Siempre pasamos con la manada, tanto los playeros como los clientes suelen ser muy buenos con nosotros, nos dan el paso y nos dejan cruzar.

(Translated by Google)
We always go with the pack; both the beachgoers and the customers are usually very good to us, they give us the right of way and let us cross.
